goal: Acknowledge inbound pricing inquiry and draft a personalized reply

steps.rationale: Resolve existing contact context before replying

args.subject: Re: Interested in pricing
args.body: Hi, thanks for reaching out! I've attached our pricing info below and I'm happy to answer any questions.

steps.rationale: Draft a reply for human review before sending

human_summary: New inbound email asking about pricing. Plan: look up the contact, then draft a reply for approval. No email will be sent automatically.
